steps.t: Dabâr warns that his tale is one of caution and offers it as reward for rescuing him, and the other from the gaol. Speak with him near the bridge in t…
Dabâr paused. You should ask him to continue his tale. You can find him near the bridge on the northern side of Ahâba.
Dabâr paused again, conscious of the eyes upon him. He beckoned you closer to finish his tale. You should speak with him near the bridge on the north …
